<html lang="ar" dir="rtl" id="htmlRoot"><head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>NEXUS TRADE v2 — AI Trading Platform</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@300;400;500;600;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.0/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --bg:#020408;--bg2:#050a10;--bg3:#080f18;--bg4:#0c1520;--bg5:#101c28;
  --surface:#0e1a24;--card:#111e2a;--card2:#152230;
  --cyan:#00d4ff;--cyan2:#00a8cc;--cyan3:rgba(0,212,255,.15);
  --green:#00ff88;--green2:#00cc6a;--green3:rgba(0,255,136,.1);
  --red:#ff3366;--red2:#cc2952;--red3:rgba(255,51,102,.1);
  --gold:#f5c518;--gold2:rgba(245,197,24,.15);
  --purple:#8b5cf6;--orange:#ff6b2b;
  --border:rgba(0,212,255,.12);--border2:rgba(0,212,255,.25);--border3:rgba(0,212,255,.5);
  --text:#e0f4ff;--text2:#a0c4d8;--text3:#5a8299;--text4:#2a4a5a;
  --font-mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;--font-hud:'Orbitron',sans-serif;--font-ui:'Cairo',sans-serif;
  --glow:0 0 20px rgba(0,212,255,.3);--glow-green:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,136,.3);--glow-red:0 0 20px rgba(255,51,102,.3);
  --left-w:200px;--right-w:255px;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font-ui);overflow:hidden;height:100vh;direction:rtl}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% -20%,rgba(0,212,255,.05),transparent),radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 80% 80%,rgba(0,255,136,.03),transparent);pointer-events:none;z-index:0}
body.ltr-mode{direction:ltr;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',var(--font-ui)}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;height:3px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg2)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--cyan2);border-radius:2px}

/* ===== NEWS TICKER ===== */
#news-ticker{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,212,255,.15),rgba(0,212,255,.05));border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);height:28px;display:flex;align-items:center;overflow:hidden;position:relative;z-index:600;flex-shrink:0}
.nt-label{background:var(--cyan);color:var(--bg);font-size:10px;font-weight:900;padding:0 12px;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;white-space:nowrap;font-family:var(--font-hud);letter-spacing:1px;flex-shrink:0}
.nt-track{display:flex;animation:ntScroll 60s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap;align-items:center;height:100%}
.nt-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused}
.nt-item{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);padding:0 28px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.nt-item::before{content:'◆';color:var(--cyan);font-size:7px;opacity:.6}
@keyframes ntScroll{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* ===== TOPBAR ===== */
#topbar{background:rgba(2,4,8,.97);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);padding:0 14px;height:42px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:relative;z-index:500;flex-shrink:0}
.logo-mark{font-family:var(--font-hud);font-size:16px;font-weight:900;color:var(--cyan);letter-spacing:2px;text-shadow:var(--glow)}
.logo-tag{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.tb-prices{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center}
.tb-price-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:4px;transition:.15s;border:1px solid transparent}
.tb-price-item:hover{background:var(--cyan3);border-color:var(--border)}
.tb-sym{color:var(--text3);font-size:10px}
.tb-val{font-weight:700}
.tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.tb-lang-btn{font-size:11px;padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);transition:.15s}
.tb-lang-btn:hover{border-color:var(--border2);color:var(--cyan)}
.tb-lang-btn.active{background:var(--cyan3);border-color:var(--border2);color:var(--cyan)}
.status-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);box-shadow:var(--glow-green);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(1.5)}}

/* ===== MAIN NAV ===== */
#main-nav{background:rgba(5,10,16,.96);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 14px;height:36px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;z-index:400;position:relative}
.nav-tabs{display:flex;gap:2px}
.nav-tab{padding:5px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);background:none;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);transition:.15s;letter-spacing:.2px;white-space:nowrap}
.nav-tab:hover{color:var(--text2);background:rgba(0,212,255,.04)}
.nav-tab.active{color:var(--cyan);background:var(--cyan3);border-color:var(--border2)}

/* ===== APP SHELL ===== */
#app-shell{display:flex;height:calc(100vh - 106px);overflow:hidden;position:relative;z-index:1}

/* ===== LEFT SIDEBAR ===== */
/* In RTL, flex order: sidebar-left renders RIGHT, sidebar-right renders LEFT */
/* So: sidebar-left = watchlist/portfolio (appears on screen right) */
/*     sidebar-right = trade panel (appears on screen left) */
#sidebar-left{width:var(--left-w);background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden}
.sl-section{flex-shrink:0}
.sl-section-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg4);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;user-select:none}
.sl-section-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;font-family:var(--font-hud);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.sl-section-toggle{color:var(--text4);font-size:10px;transition:.2s}
.sl-section-body{overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .3s ease}

/* Portfolio Mini (smaller) */
.port-mini{padding:10px}
.pm-bal-label{font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1px;font-family:var(--font-hud)}
.pm-balance{font-family:var(--font-hud);font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);text-shadow:var(--glow);letter-spacing:1px}
.pm-pnl{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-top:3px}
.pm-stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-top:8px}
.pm-stat{background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;padding:5px 7px}
.pm-stat-label{font-size:8px;color:var(--text4);font-family:var(--font-hud)}
.pm-stat-val{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono)}

/* Market Dropdown */
.market-group{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.market-group-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 10px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;background:var(--bg3)}
.market-group-hdr:hover{background:var(--bg4)}
.mg-name{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud);letter-spacing:.8px}
.mg-count{font-size:9px;color:var(--text4);font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.mg-arrow{color:var(--text4);font-size:9px;transition:.2s}
.mg-arrow.open{transform:rotate(90deg)}
.market-group-body{overflow:hidden;max-height:0;transition:max-height .3s ease}
.market-group-body.open{max-height:400px}

.pair-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 10px 6px 8px;cursor:pointer;transition:.1s;border-left:2px solid transparent}
.pair-row:hover{background:rgba(0,212,255,.04)}
.pair-row.active{background:var(--cyan3);border-left-color:var(--cyan)}
.pr-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.pr-flag{font-size:13px;line-height:1}
.pr-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text)}
.pr-right{text-align:left;direction:ltr}
.pr-price{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.pr-chg{font-size:9px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:600}
.up{color:var(--green)} .dn{color:var(--red)}


/* ===== CENTER ===== */
#center{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0}

/* ===== CHART ENGINE ===== */
.chart-header{padding:5px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;min-height:0}
.ch-main{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.ch-pair{font-family:var(--font-hud);font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);letter-spacing:2px;text-shadow:var(--glow)}
.ch-price{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:700}
.ch-change{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700}
.ch-ohlc{display:flex;gap:12px}
.ch-ohlc-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center}
.ch-ohlc-l{font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:.8px;font-family:var(--font-hud)}
.ch-ohlc-v{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.tf-btns{display:flex;gap:3px}
.tf-btn{padding:3px 7px;font-size:10px;background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-mono);transition:.1s}
.tf-btn:hover,.tf-btn.active{background:var(--cyan3);border-color:var(--border2);color:var(--cyan)}
.chart-type-btns{display:flex;gap:2px}
.ct-btn{padding:3px 7px;font-size:11px;background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-mono);transition:.1s;min-width:26px}
.ct-btn:hover,.ct-btn.active{background:rgba(139,92,246,.2);border-color:rgba(139,92,246,.4);color:var(--purple)}
/* chart wrap — flex column so sub-chart sits below */
.chart-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-height:0;background:#0b1017}
#mainChartArea{flex:1;position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:0;cursor:crosshair}
#tvCanvas{position:absolute;top:0;left:0}
.sub-chart-panel{height:90px;flex-shrink:0;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-top:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.1);background:#080d14}
#subCanvas{position:absolute;top:0;left:0}
.sub-chart-label{position:absolute;top:4px;left:8px;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--font-mono);color:rgba(100,140,170,.7);pointer-events:none;z-index:5}
/* chart tool buttons */
.chart-tools{display:flex;gap:3px;align-items:center}
.tool-btn{width:26px;height:26px;background:rgba(8,15,24,.85);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.15);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;transition:.15s;color:var(--text3)}
.tool-btn:hover,.tool-btn.act{background:rgba(0,212,255,.15);border-color:rgba(0,212,255,.4);color:var(--cyan)}
.tool-sep{width:1px;height:18px;background:rgba(0,212,255,.1);margin:0 2px}
/* indicators dropdown */
.ind-dropdown{position:relative;display:inline-block}
.ind-panel{display:none;position:absolute;top:30px;right:0;background:rgba(5,10,20,.98);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;width:180px;z-index:200;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.8)}
.ind-panel.open{display:block}
.ind-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.06);cursor:pointer}
.ind-row:last-child{border:none}
.ind-box{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:2px;border:2px solid;flex-shrink:0;transition:.15s}
.ind-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--font-mono)}

/* Open Positions Panel (below chart) */
.open-positions-panel{border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg2);max-height:180px}
.opp-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg4)}
.opp-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;font-family:var(--font-hud);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.opp-badge{background:var(--cyan3);color:var(--cyan);font-size:9px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.opp-table{overflow-y:auto;max-height:140px}
.opp-col-hdr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:90px 46px 46px 76px 76px 62px 62px 68px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text4);font-family:var(--font-hud);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3)}
.opp-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:90px 46px 46px 76px 76px 62px 62px 68px;padding:5px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:10px;transition:.1s;align-items:center}
.opp-row:hover{background:rgba(0,212,255,.03)}
.opp-pair{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--text);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.opp-dir-buy{color:var(--green);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700}
.opp-dir-sell{color:var(--red);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700}
.opp-num{font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text2);font-size:10px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.opp-pnl{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700;font-size:10px}
.close-btn{background:rgba(255,51,102,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,51,102,.25);color:var(--red);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;cursor:pointer;transition:.1s;font-family:var(--font-ui)}
.close-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,51,102,.2)}

/* ===== RIGHT SIDEBAR ===== */
#sidebar-right{width:var(--right-w);background:var(--bg2);border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden}
.rp-tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;overflow-x:auto}
.rp-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0}
.rp-tab{flex-shrink:0;padding:9px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);transition:.15s;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap}
.rp-tab:hover{color:var(--text2)}
.rp-tab.active{color:var(--cyan);border-bottom-color:var(--cyan)}
.rp-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px}
.rp-body::-webkit-scrollbar{width:2px}

/* Trade Panel */
.trade-mode{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5px;margin-bottom:12px}
.trade-mode-btn{padding:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);transition:.2s}
.tmbuy{color:var(--green);border-color:rgba(0,255,136,.25)}
.tmbuy:hover,.tmbuy.act{background:rgba(0,255,136,.12);box-shadow:var(--glow-green)}
.tmsell{color:var(--red);border-color:rgba(255,51,102,.25)}
.tmsell:hover,.tmsell.act{background:rgba(255,51,102,.12);box-shadow:var(--glow-red)}
.f-grp{margin-bottom:10px}
.f-lbl{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:5px;font-family:var(--font-hud);display:flex;justify-content:space-between}
.f-inp{width:100%;background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);padding:8px 10px;border-radius:5px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;transition:.15s;direction:ltr}
.f-inp:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--border3)}
.lev-grid{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.lev-btn{padding:5px 6px;font-size:9px;background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-mono);transition:.1s;font-weight:700}
.lev-btn:hover,.lev-btn.act{background:var(--cyan3);border-color:var(--border2);color:var(--cyan)}
.risk-box{background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;margin-top:8px}
.rb-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;padding:3px 0}
.rb-k{color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-ui)}
.rb-v{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700}
.exec-btn{width:100%;padding:11px;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;border-radius:6px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-hud);letter-spacing:1px;transition:.2s;margin-top:10px}
.exec-buy{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#004d25,#008844,#00cc6a);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,255,136,.25)}
.exec-sell{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4d0018,#880033,#cc2952);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(255,51,102,.25)}
.exec-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px)}

/* AI Signals (smaller) */
.signal-mini{background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 8px;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.signal-mini::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:2px;height:100%}
.sig-buy-line::before{background:var(--green)}
.sig-sell-line::before{background:var(--red)}
.signal-mini:hover{border-color:var(--border2)}
.sm-row1{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:5px}
.sm-pair{font-family:var(--font-hud);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
.sm-action{padding:2px 7px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:900;font-family:var(--font-hud);letter-spacing:.5px}
.sm-buy{background:rgba(0,255,136,.12);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.25)}
.sm-sell{background:rgba(255,51,102,.12);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(255,51,102,.25)}
.sm-levels{display:flex;gap:10px;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-bottom:5px}
.sm-tp{color:var(--green)} .sm-sl{color:var(--red)}
.sm-conf-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.sm-conf-bar{flex:1;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}
.sm-conf-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px}
.sm-conf-pct{font-size:9px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700}
.sm-reason{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.5;margin-top:5px;padding-top:5px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

/* BOT Panel */
.bot-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:10px}
.bot-icon{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(139,92,246,.3),rgba(0,212,255,.2));border:1px solid var(--border2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;animation:botGlow 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes botGlow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,212,255,.2)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,212,255,.5)}}
.bot-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-hud);color:var(--text)}
.bot-state{font-size:9px;font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-top:2px}
.bot-running{color:var(--green)} .bot-stopped{color:var(--text3)}
.toggle-sw{position:relative;width:40px;height:20px}
.toggle-sw input{opacity:0;position:absolute}
.toggle-sl{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:.25s}
.toggle-sl::before{content:'';position:absolute;width:14px;height:14px;right:2px;top:2px;background:var(--text3);border-radius:50%;transition:.25s}
.toggle-sw input:checked+.toggle-sl{background:rgba(0,255,136,.15);border-color:var(--green)}
.toggle-sw input:checked+.toggle-sl::before{background:var(--green);right:auto;left:2px;box-shadow:var(--glow-green)}

.bot-sub-tabs{display:flex;gap:3px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.bst{padding:4px 9px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);transition:.1s}
.bst:hover,.bst.act{background:var(--cyan3);border-color:var(--border2);color:var(--cyan)}

.slider-row{margin-bottom:8px}
.slider-lbl{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:3px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.slider-val{color:var(--cyan);font-weight:700}
input[type=range]{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;outline:none;cursor:pointer}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--cyan);border-radius:50%;box-shadow:var(--glow);cursor:pointer}

/* Strategy cards */
.strat-card{background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:9px;margin-bottom:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.strat-card.selected{border-color:var(--cyan);background:var(--cyan3)}
.strat-card:hover{border-color:var(--border2)}
.sc-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px}
.sc-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-hud);color:var(--text)}
.sc-badge{font-size:8px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-family:var(--font-hud);font-weight:700}
.scb-safe{background:rgba(0,255,136,.1);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.2)}
.scb-mid{background:rgba(245,197,24,.1);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(245,197,24,.2)}
.scb-aggr{background:rgba(255,51,102,.1);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(255,51,102,.2)}
.sc-desc{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.5}
.sc-stats{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:5px;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.sc-win{color:var(--green)} .sc-dd{color:var(--red)}

/* Bot live log */
.bot-log{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;max-height:160px;overflow-y:auto}
.log-entry{padding:2px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.05);display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start}
.log-time{color:var(--text4);flex-shrink:0}
.log-msg{color:var(--text3)}
.log-buy{color:var(--green)}
.log-sell{color:var(--red)}
.log-info{color:var(--cyan)}
.log-warn{color:var(--gold)}

/* ===== FULL PAGES ===== */
.full-page{display:none;flex-direction:column;height:calc(100vh - 106px);overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;position:relative;z-index:1}
.full-page.active{display:flex}
.fp-wrap{padding:16px 20px;max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;flex-shrink:0}
.fp-title{font-family:var(--font-hud);font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}

/* STATS GRID */
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px}
.stat-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.stat-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px}
.sc-cyan::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),var(--cyan2))}
.sc-green::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green),var(--green2))}
.sc-red::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--red),var(--red2))}
.sc-gold::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),#c4980f)}
.sc-purple::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--purple),#6d44c4)}
.stat-label{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud);margin-bottom:6px}
.stat-val{font-family:var(--font-hud);font-size:22px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px}
.stat-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}

/* Table */
.data-table{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden}
.dt-head{display:flex;background:var(--bg4);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:8px 14px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud);gap:0}
.dt-row{display:flex;padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;transition:.1s;align-items:center;gap:0}
.dt-row:hover{background:rgba(0,212,255,.02)}
.dt-row:last-child{border:none}

/* Chart cards */
.chart-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:16px}
.cc-title{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud);margin-bottom:12px}
.charts-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px}
.charts-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px}

/* ===== NEWS PAGE ===== */
.news-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:20px}
.news-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.news-card:hover{border-color:var(--border2);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.news-impact{display:inline-block;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:3px;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-hud);letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:8px}
.ni-high{background:rgba(255,51,102,.15);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(255,51,102,.25)}
.ni-med{background:rgba(245,197,24,.12);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(245,197,24,.2)}
.ni-low{background:rgba(0,212,255,.1);color:var(--cyan);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.2)}
.news-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.5;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px}
.news-meta{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);display:flex;gap:10px}

/* ===== CALENDAR PAGE ===== */
.cal-table .dt-head{grid-template-columns:80px 1fr 120px 80px 80px 80px}
.cal-table .dt-row{grid-template-columns:80px 1fr 120px 80px 80px 80px;display:grid}
.cal-time{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--cyan)}
.cal-event{font-size:11px;color:var(--text)}
.cal-country{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.cal-prev{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)}
.cal-fore{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--gold)}
.cal-actual{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700}

/* ===== RISK PAGE ===== */
.risk-meters{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
.risk-meter{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;text-align:center}

.rm-label{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud);margin-bottom:10px}
.rm-val{font-family:var(--font-hud);font-size:26px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px}
.rm-bar-wrap{height:4px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:6px}
.rm-bar{height:100%;border-radius:2px;transition:.5s}
.rm-desc{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono)}

/* ===== SETTINGS PAGE ===== */
.settings-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:220px 1fr;gap:20px}
.settings-nav{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:8px}
.sn-item{padding:9px 12px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);transition:.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.sn-item:hover{color:var(--text);background:rgba(0,212,255,.05)}
.sn-item.active{color:var(--cyan);background:var(--cyan3)}
.settings-content{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:20px}
.s-section-title{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud);margin-bottom:14px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.api-key-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:12px}
.api-exchange-icon{font-size:22px;flex-shrink:0}
.api-exchange-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.api-exchange-status{font-size:9px;margin-top:2px}
.api-connected{color:var(--green)} .api-disconnected{color:var(--text3)}
.api-inp{flex:1;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);padding:7px 10px;border-radius:5px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px}
.api-inp:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--border2)}
.api-connect-btn{padding:7px 14px;background:var(--cyan3);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--cyan);border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-weight:600;transition:.15s}
.api-connect-btn:hover{background:rgba(0,212,255,.25)}
.theme-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
.theme-swatch{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;transition:.15s;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:5px;font-size:8px;font-family:var(--font-hud)}
.theme-swatch.selected{border-color:var(--cyan);box-shadow:var(--glow)}
.theme-swatch:hover{transform:scale(1.05)}
.s-toggle-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.s-toggle-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font-ui)}
.s-toggle-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px}

/* ===== PERFORMANCE PAGE ===== */
.perf-header-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px}
.export-btns{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.exp-btn{padding:8px 14px;border-radius:7px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg4);color:var(--text3);transition:.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:120px}
.exp-btn:hover{border-color:var(--border2);color:var(--cyan);background:var(--bg3)}
.exp-csv{border-color:rgba(0,255,136,.25);color:var(--green)}
.exp-csv:hover{background:rgba(0,255,136,.06)}
.exp-pdf{border-color:rgba(255,51,102,.25);color:var(--red)}
.exp-pdf:hover{background:rgba(255,51,102,.06)}

/* Toast */
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:20px;right:20px;background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);padding:10px 18px;border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-weight:600;box-shadow:var(--glow);opacity:0;transform:translateY(15px);transition:.3s;z-index:9999}
.toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.toast.t-buy{border-color:rgba(0,255,136,.4)}
.toast.t-sell{border-color:rgba(255,51,102,.4)}

/* Loading */
.ai-loading{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;padding:12px 0;font-family:var(--font-ui)}
.think-dots{display:flex;gap:3px}
.think-dots span{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;animation:think .7s ease-in-out infinite}
.think-dots span:nth-child(1){background:var(--cyan)}
.think-dots span:nth-child(2){background:var(--purple);animation-delay:.12s}
.think-dots span:nth-child(3){background:var(--green);animation-delay:.24s}
@keyframes think{0%,60%,100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:.3}30%{transform:translateY(-6px);opacity:1}}

/* Divider */
.s-divider{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:12px 0}

/* Mobile */
@media(max-width:900px){
  :root{--left-w:0px;--right-w:260px}
  #sidebar-left{display:none}
  .opp-col-hdr,.opp-row{grid-template-columns:90px 45px 60px 70px 55px}
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NEXUS CHART ENGINE — tested standalone, now integrated
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const CFG = {
  UP:'#26a69a', DN:'#ef5350',
  GRID:'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)',
  TEXT:'rgba(100,140,170,0.8)',
  CROSS:'rgba(160,200,220,0.3)',
  PW:62, TH:20, SUB:0, VOL:0.12   // SUB=0: main chart fills full height, sub is separate canvas
};
const ST = {
  candles:[], ha:[], type:'candle', sub:'rsi', tf:15,
  inds:{ma20:false,ma50:false,bb:false,vwap:false},
  tool:'cursor', drawings:[], drawStart:null,
  rightOffset:0, barsVis:80,
  mx:-1, my:-1, drag:false, dragX0:0, dragOff0:0,
  W:0, H:0, mH:0, pMin:0, pMax:1,
  barsData:[], startIdx:0, barW:0, barSpacing:0,
};
let CH_ctx, CH_subCtx, CH_dirty=true, CH_DPR=1;

// ── DATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_gen(pair) {
  const info=S.prices[pair]||{p:1.0843,d:5};
  const dp=info.d;
  const targetPrice=info.p;
  const vol=targetPrice*0.0018;
  ST.candles=[]; const now=Date.now();
  // Start from ~3% below target, trend toward it over 400 candles
  let p=targetPrice*(0.97+Math.random()*0.02);
  for(let i=400;i>=0;i--){
    // slight drift toward target price
    const drift=(targetPrice-p)*0.004;
    const bias=(Math.random()-0.47)*0.25+drift/vol;
    const o=p+(Math.random()-0.5)*vol*0.3;
    const c=o+bias*vol+(Math.random()-0.5)*vol*0.5;
    const sw=Math.abs(c-o)+Math.random()*vol*0.3;
    const h=Math.max(o,c)+Math.random()*sw*0.5;
    const l=Math.min(o,c)-Math.random()*sw*0.5;
    ST.candles.push({o:+o.toFixed(dp),h:+h.toFixed(dp),l:+l.toFixed(dp),c:+c.toFixed(dp),v:Math.floor(80+Math.random()*800),t:now-i*ST.tf*60000});
    p=c;
  }
  // Force last candle close to match real price
  if(ST.candles.length){
    const last=ST.candles[ST.candles.length-1];
    last.c=+targetPrice.toFixed(dp);
    last.h=Math.max(last.h,last.c);
    last.l=Math.min(last.l,last.c);
  }
  CH_buildHA(); ST.rightOffset=0; ST.barsVis=80; CH_dirty=true;
}
function CH_buildHA(){
  ST.ha=[];
  ST.candles.forEach((d,i)=>{
    const hC=(d.o+d.h+d.l+d.c)/4;
    const hO=i===0?(d.o+d.c)/2:(ST.ha[i-1].o+ST.ha[i-1].c)/2;
    ST.ha.push({o:hO,h:Math.max(d.h,hO,hC),l:Math.min(d.l,hO,hC),c:hC,v:d.v,t:d.t});
  });
}
function CH_data(){ return ST.type==='heikin'?ST.ha:ST.candles; }

// ── INDICATORS ────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_sma(arr,p){ return arr.map((_,i)=>i<p-1?null:arr.slice(i-p+1,i+1).reduce((s,v)=>s+v,0)/p); }
function CH_ema(arr,p){ const k=2/(p+1);let e=arr[0];return arr.map((v,i)=>{e=i===0?v:v*k+e*(1-k);return e;}); }
function CH_bb(cls,p=20){ const ma=CH_sma(cls,p);return cls.map((_,i)=>{if(i<p-1)return null;const sl=cls.slice(i-p+1,i+1),m=ma[i],sd=Math.sqrt(sl.reduce((a,v)=>a+(v-m)**2,0)/p);return{u:m+2*sd,m,l:m-2*sd};}); }
function CH_rsi(cls,p=14){ const out=[];let ag=0,al=0;for(let i=1;i<cls.length;i++){const d=cls[i]-cls[i-1],g=d>0?d:0,l=d<0?-d:0;if(i<=p){ag+=g/p;al+=l/p;out.push(null);continue;}ag=(ag*(p-1)+g)/p;al=(al*(p-1)+l)/p;out.push(al===0?100:100-100/(1+ag/al));}return out; }
function CH_macd(cls){ const k12=2/13,k26=2/27,k9=2/10;let e12=cls[0],e26=cls[0],sg=0;const m=[],s=[],h=[];cls.forEach((v,i)=>{e12=i===0?v:v*k12+e12*(1-k12);e26=i===0?v:v*k26+e26*(1-k26);const mc=e12-e26;sg=i===0?mc:mc*k9+sg*(1-k9);m.push(mc);s.push(sg);h.push(mc-sg);});return{m,s,h}; }
function CH_stoch(bars,p=14){ return bars.map((_,i)=>{if(i<p-1)return null;const sl=bars.slice(i-p+1,i+1),lo=Math.min(...sl.map(b=>b.l)),hi=Math.max(...sl.map(b=>b.h));return hi===lo?50:(bars[i].c-lo)/(hi-lo)*100;}); }
function CH_vwap(bars){ let cv=0,cw=0;return bars.map(b=>{const tp=(b.h+b.l+b.c)/3;cv+=tp*b.v;cw+=b.v;return cv/cw;}); }

// ── LAYOUT ────────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_niceStep(range,count){ const raw=range/count,mag=Math.pow(10,Math.floor(Math.log10(raw)));for(const s of[1,2,2.5,5,10])if(s*mag>=raw)return s*mag;return mag*10; }
function CH_layout(){
  const all=CH_data(),n=all.length;
  const bv=Math.max(5,Math.min(ST.barsVis,n));
  const end=Math.max(bv,n-ST.rightOffset);
  const start=Math.max(0,end-bv);
  ST.barsData=all.slice(start,end); ST.startIdx=start;
  const prices=ST.barsData.flatMap(b=>[b.h,b.l]);
  let pMin=Math.min(...prices),pMax=Math.max(...prices);
  const r=pMax-pMin||pMin*0.01;
  ST.pMin=pMin-r*0.18; ST.pMax=pMax+r*0.18;
  const cW=ST.W-CFG.PW;
  ST.mH=ST.H-CFG.TH-CFG.SUB-1;
  // Add 8% right margin so last candle has breathing room from price axis
  const MARGIN_BARS=Math.max(2,Math.round(ST.barsData.length*0.08));
  ST.barSpacing=cW/Math.max(1,ST.barsData.length+MARGIN_BARS);
  ST.barW=Math.max(1,ST.barSpacing*0.72);
}
const pToY=p=>CFG.SUB+ST.mH*(1-(p-ST.pMin)/(ST.pMax-ST.pMin));
const xOfBar=i=>(i+0.5)*ST.barSpacing;
const barAtX=x=>Math.round(x/ST.barSpacing-0.5);

// ── RESIZE ────────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_resize(){
  const area=document.getElementById('mainChartArea');
  const subPanel=document.getElementById('subChartPanel')||document.querySelector('.sub-chart-panel');
  const mc=document.getElementById('tvCanvas');
  const sc=document.getElementById('subCanvas');
  if(!area||!mc) return;
  CH_DPR=window.devicePixelRatio||1;
  const W=area.clientWidth, H=area.clientHeight;
  if(!W||!H) return;
  mc.width=W*CH_DPR; mc.height=H*CH_DPR;
  mc.style.width=W+'px'; mc.style.height=H+'px';
  CH_ctx=mc.getContext('2d'); CH_ctx.scale(CH_DPR,CH_DPR);
  ST.W=W; ST.H=H;
  if(subPanel&&sc){
    const sW=subPanel.clientWidth,sH=subPanel.clientHeight;
    sc.width=sW*CH_DPR; sc.height=sH*CH_DPR;
    sc.style.width=sW+'px'; sc.style.height=sH+'px';
    CH_subCtx=sc.getContext('2d'); CH_subCtx.scale(CH_DPR,CH_DPR);
  }
}

// ── DRAW MAIN ─────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_drawMain(){
  if(!CH_ctx) return;
  const ctx=CH_ctx, bars=ST.barsData, cW=ST.W-CFG.PW, mH=ST.mH, dp=S.prices[S.pair]?.d||5;
  ctx.fillStyle='#0b1017'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,ST.W,ST.H);
  // grid
  ctx.strokeStyle=CFG.GRID; ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
  const pStep=CH_niceStep(ST.pMax-ST.pMin,7);
  let pg=Math.ceil(ST.pMin/pStep)*pStep;
  ctx.font='9px JetBrains Mono'; ctx.textAlign='left';
  while(pg<=ST.pMax){
    const y=pToY(pg);
    if(y>CFG.SUB&&y<CFG.SUB+mH){
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(cW,y);ctx.stroke();
      ctx.fillStyle=CFG.TEXT; ctx.fillText(pg.toFixed(dp),cW+4,y+3);
    }
    pg+=pStep;
  }
  const tStep=Math.max(1,Math.floor(bars.length/8));
  // ── Trading Sessions background ────────────────────────
  bars.forEach((b,i)=>{
    const hr=new Date(b.t).getUTCHours();
    let sessionColor=null;
    if(hr>=0&&hr<8)   sessionColor='rgba(139,92,246,0.04)';   // Tokyo — purple
    if(hr>=8&&hr<16)  sessionColor='rgba(0,212,255,0.05)';    // London — cyan
    if(hr>=13&&hr<21) sessionColor='rgba(245,197,24,0.04)';   // New York — gold
    if(sessionColor){
      const x=xOfBar(i)-ST.barSpacing/2;
      ctx.fillStyle=sessionColor;
      ctx.fillRect(x,0,ST.barSpacing,mH);
    }
  });
  // Session legend
  [['Tokyo','rgba(139,92,246,0.7)',0],['London','rgba(0,212,255,0.7)',55],['New York','rgba(245,197,24,0.7)',115]].forEach(([name,col,ox])=>{
    ctx.fillStyle=col; ctx.font='8px JetBrains Mono'; ctx.textAlign='left';
    ctx.fillText('■ '+name, ox+5, 14);
  });
  for(let i=0;i<bars.length;i+=tStep){
    const x=xOfBar(i);
    ctx.strokeStyle=CFG.GRID; ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,CFG.SUB);ctx.lineTo(x,CFG.SUB+mH);ctx.stroke();
    const d=new Date(bars[i].t);
    ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillStyle=CFG.TEXT;
    ctx.fillText(`${d.getMonth()+1}/${d.getDate()} ${String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')}`,x,ST.H-4);
  }
  // volume
  const maxV=Math.max(...bars.map(b=>b.v),1);
  bars.forEach((b,i)=>{
    const x=xOfBar(i),vH=(b.v/maxV)*mH*CFG.VOL;
    ctx.fillStyle=b.c>=b.o?'rgba(38,166,154,0.45)':'rgba(239,83,80,0.45)';
    ctx.fillRect(x-ST.barW/2,CFG.SUB+mH-vH,ST.barW,vH);
  });
  // bollinger
  if(ST.inds.bb){
    const all=CH_data(),cls=all.map(b=>b.c);
    const bb=CH_bb(cls).slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    ctx.beginPath();bb.forEach((v,i)=>{if(v)ctx.lineTo(xOfBar(i),pToY(v.u));});
    for(let i=bb.length-1;i>=0;i--)if(bb[i])ctx.lineTo(xOfBar(i),pToY(bb[i].l));
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,200,255,0.03)';ctx.fill();
    ['u','l'].forEach(k=>{
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,200,255,0.4)';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.setLineDash([5,4]);
      bb.forEach((v,i)=>{if(!v)return;const x=xOfBar(i),y=pToY(v[k]);i===0||!bb[i-1]?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);});
      ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
    });
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,200,255,0.2)';ctx.lineWidth=0.8;
    bb.forEach((v,i)=>{if(!v)return;const x=xOfBar(i),y=pToY(v.m);i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);});ctx.stroke();
  }
  // MAs
  const all=CH_data(),cls=all.map(b=>b.c);
  [[ST.inds.ma20,20,'#f5c518'],[ST.inds.ma50,50,'#8b5cf6']].forEach(([on,p,col])=>{
    if(!on)return;
    const vals=CH_sma(cls,p).slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle=col;ctx.lineWidth=1.5;let s=false;
    vals.forEach((v,i)=>{if(v===null)return;const x=xOfBar(i),y=pToY(v);if(!s){ctx.moveTo(x,y);s=true;}else ctx.lineTo(x,y);});ctx.stroke();
  });
  // VWAP
  if(ST.inds.vwap){
    const vw=CH_vwap(all).slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='#ff9500';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.setLineDash([6,3]);
    vw.forEach((v,i)=>{const x=xOfBar(i),y=pToY(v);i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);});
    ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
  }
  // candles
  if(ST.type==='line'||ST.type==='area'){
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle=CFG.UP;ctx.lineWidth=2;
    bars.forEach((b,i)=>{const x=xOfBar(i),y=pToY(b.c);i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);});
    if(ST.type==='area'){
      ctx.lineTo(xOfBar(bars.length-1),CFG.SUB+mH);ctx.lineTo(xOfBar(0),CFG.SUB+mH);ctx.closePath();
      const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,CFG.SUB,0,CFG.SUB+mH);
      g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(38,166,154,0.28)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(38,166,154,0.01)');
      ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fill();
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle=CFG.UP;ctx.lineWidth=2;
      bars.forEach((b,i)=>{const x=xOfBar(i),y=pToY(b.c);i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);});
    }
    ctx.stroke();
  } else {
    bars.forEach((b,i)=>{
      const x=xOfBar(i),up=b.c>=b.o,uc=CFG.UP,dc=CFG.DN;
      const yH=pToY(b.h),yL=pToY(b.l),yO=pToY(b.o),yC=pToY(b.c);
      const bTop=Math.min(yO,yC),bH=Math.max(1,Math.abs(yO-yC)),hw=ST.barW/2;
      if(ST.type==='bar'){
        ctx.strokeStyle=up?uc:dc;ctx.lineWidth=1.5;
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,yH);ctx.lineTo(x,yL);ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x-hw,yO);ctx.lineTo(x,yO);ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,yC);ctx.lineTo(x+hw,yC);ctx.stroke();
      } else {
        ctx.strokeStyle=up?'rgba(38,166,154,0.5)':'rgba(239,83,80,0.5)';ctx.lineWidth=1;
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,yH);ctx.lineTo(x,bTop);ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,bTop+bH);ctx.lineTo(x,yL);ctx.stroke();
        if(ST.type==='hollow'){
          if(up){ctx.strokeStyle=uc;ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.strokeRect(x-hw,bTop,ST.barW,bH);}
          else{ctx.fillStyle=dc;ctx.fillRect(x-hw,bTop,ST.barW,bH);}
        } else {
          ctx.fillStyle=up?'rgba(38,166,154,0.85)':'rgba(239,83,80,0.85)';
          ctx.fillRect(x-hw,bTop,ST.barW,bH);
          ctx.strokeStyle=up?'rgba(38,166,154,0.3)':'rgba(239,83,80,0.3)';ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
          ctx.strokeRect(x-hw,bTop,ST.barW,bH);
        }
      }
    });
  }
  // drawings
  CH_renderDrawings(ctx,cW,dp);
  // ── Last candle highlight + NOW line ──────────────────
  const last=bars[bars.length-1];
  if(last){
    const lx=xOfBar(bars.length-1);
    // Vertical "NOW" glow line on last candle
    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,212,255,0.18)';ctx.lineWidth=ST.barW+2;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(lx,0);ctx.lineTo(lx,mH);ctx.stroke();
    // NOW label at top
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,212,255,0.6)';ctx.font='bold 8px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('NOW',lx,10);

    // Horizontal current price dashed line
    const ly=pToY(last.c);
    ctx.setLineDash([4,5]);ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,212,255,0.55)';ctx.lineWidth=1;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,ly);ctx.lineTo(cW,ly);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);

    // Price badge on Y axis — green if up, red if down
    const prevC=bars.length>1?bars[bars.length-2].c:last.c;
    const isUp=last.c>=prevC;
    ctx.fillStyle=isUp?'rgba(38,166,154,0.95)':'rgba(239,83,80,0.95)';
    ctx.fillRect(cW,ly-9,CFG.PW,18);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 9px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(last.c.toFixed(dp),cW+CFG.PW/2,ly+3);

    // Update header
    const chP=document.getElementById('chPrice');
    const chChg=document.getElementById('chChange');
    if(chP) chP.textContent=last.c.toFixed(dp);
    if(chP) chP.className='ch-price '+(isUp?'up':'dn');
    if(chChg){
      const pct=((last.c-prevC)/prevC*100);
      chChg.textContent=(isUp?'▲ +':'▼ ')+pct.toFixed(2)+'%';
      chChg.className='ch-change '+(isUp?'up':'dn');
    }
    const tpl=document.getElementById('tradePriceLive');
    if(tpl) tpl.textContent=last.c.toFixed(dp);
  }
  // crosshair
  if(ST.mx>=0&&ST.mx<=cW&&ST.my>=CFG.SUB&&ST.my<=CFG.SUB+mH){
    ctx.strokeStyle=CFG.CROSS;ctx.lineWidth=0.8;ctx.setLineDash([4,4]);
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(ST.mx,CFG.SUB);ctx.lineTo(ST.mx,CFG.SUB+mH);ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,ST.my);ctx.lineTo(cW,ST.my);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
    const hp=ST.pMax-(ST.pMax-ST.pMin)*((ST.my-CFG.SUB)/mH);
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,55,75,0.95)';ctx.fillRect(cW,ST.my-9,CFG.PW,18);
    ctx.fillStyle='#e0f4ff';ctx.font='9px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(hp.toFixed(dp),cW+CFG.PW/2,ST.my+3);
    const bi=Math.max(0,Math.min(bars.length-1,barAtX(ST.mx)));
    if(bars[bi]){
      const d=new Date(bars[bi].t);
      const ts=`${d.getMonth()+1}/${d.getDate()} ${String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')}`;
      const tw=ctx.measureText(ts).width+8;
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,55,75,0.95)';ctx.fillRect(ST.mx-tw/2,ST.H-CFG.TH,tw,CFG.TH);
      ctx.fillStyle='#e0f4ff';ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText(ts,ST.mx,ST.H-CFG.TH+13);
      const b=bars[bi];
      document.getElementById('chO').textContent=b.o.toFixed(dp);
      document.getElementById('chH').textContent=b.h.toFixed(dp);
      document.getElementById('chL').textContent=b.l.toFixed(dp);
      document.getElementById('chV').textContent=(b.v/1000).toFixed(1)+'K';
    }
  }
  // drawing preview
  if(ST.drawStart&&ST.mx>=0){
    const x1=xOfBar(ST.drawStart.b-ST.startIdx),y1=pToY(ST.drawStart.p);
    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,200,0,0.5)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.setLineDash([4,4]);
    ctx.beginPath();
    if(ST.tool==='trend'||ST.tool==='fib'){ctx.moveTo(x1,y1);ctx.lineTo(ST.mx,ST.my);}
    else if(ST.tool==='rect'){ctx.rect(Math.min(x1,ST.mx),Math.min(y1,ST.my),Math.abs(ST.mx-x1),Math.abs(ST.my-y1));}
    ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
  }
}

// ── DRAW SUB ──────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_drawSub(){
  if(!CH_subCtx) return;
  const ctx=CH_subCtx;
  const subPanel=document.getElementById('subChartPanel')||document.querySelector('.sub-chart-panel');
  if(!subPanel)return;
  const W=subPanel.clientWidth,H=subPanel.clientHeight;
  if(!W||!H)return;
  const cW=W-CFG.PW;
  ctx.fillStyle='#080d14';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,212,255,0.1)';ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,0);ctx.lineTo(W,0);ctx.stroke();
  const all=CH_data(),cls=all.map(b=>b.c);
  const bars=ST.barsData;
  const bSp=cW/Math.max(1,bars.length);
  const xB=i=>(i+0.5)*bSp;
  const lbl=document.getElementById('subLabel');
  if(ST.sub==='rsi'){
    const rsi=CH_rsi(cls).slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    // Overbought/Oversold fill zones
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(239,83,80,0.08)';
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,cW,H*0.3);           // above 70
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(38,166,154,0.08)';
    ctx.fillRect(0,H*0.7,cW,H*0.3);       // below 30
    // Level lines
    [[30,'rgba(239,83,80,0.4)'],[50,'rgba(100,140,170,0.2)'],[70,'rgba(239,83,80,0.4)']].forEach(([lv,c])=>{
      const y=H*(1-lv/100);ctx.strokeStyle=c;ctx.lineWidth=0.8;ctx.setLineDash([3,4]);
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(cW,y);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(160,180,200,0.7)';ctx.font='8px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='left';
      ctx.fillText(lv,cW+3,y+3);
    });
    // Single continuous RSI line (neutral color) — much faster
    let lastR=50;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,212,255,0.85)';ctx.lineWidth=1.4;
    let started=false;
    rsi.forEach((v,i)=>{
      if(v===null)return; lastR=v;
      const x=xB(i),y=H*(1-v/100);
      if(!started){ctx.moveTo(x,y);started=true;}else ctx.lineTo(x,y);
    });
    ctx.stroke();
    // Overbought segment overlay in red
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(239,83,80,0.9)';ctx.lineWidth=1.8;
    started=false;
    rsi.forEach((v,i)=>{
      if(v===null||v<=70){started=false;return;}
      const x=xB(i),y=H*(1-v/100);
      if(!started){ctx.moveTo(x,y);started=true;}else ctx.lineTo(x,y);
    });
    ctx.stroke();
    // Oversold segment overlay in green
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(38,166,154,0.9)';ctx.lineWidth=1.8;
    started=false;
    rsi.forEach((v,i)=>{
      if(v===null||v>=30){started=false;return;}
      const x=xB(i),y=H*(1-v/100);
      if(!started){ctx.moveTo(x,y);started=true;}else ctx.lineTo(x,y);
    });
    ctx.stroke();
    if(lbl)lbl.textContent=`RSI(14): ${lastR.toFixed(1)}`;
    const ry=H*(1-lastR/100);
    const rsiColor=lastR>70?CFG.DN:lastR<30?CFG.UP:'rgba(0,212,255,0.9)';
    ctx.fillStyle=rsiColor;ctx.fillRect(cW+2,ry-7,CFG.PW-4,14);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 9px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(lastR.toFixed(1),cW+CFG.PW/2,ry+3);
  } else if(ST.sub==='macd'){
    const {m,s,h}=CH_macd(cls);
    const mV=m.slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    const sV=s.slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    const hV=h.slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    const mx=Math.max(...hV.map(Math.abs))||0.001;
    const mid=H/2,yV=v=>mid-(v/mx)*mid*0.88;
    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(100,140,170,0.2)';ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,mid);ctx.lineTo(cW,mid);ctx.stroke();
    hV.forEach((v,i)=>{const x=xB(i),y=yV(v),w=Math.max(1,bSp*0.7);ctx.fillStyle=v>=0?'rgba(38,166,154,0.5)':'rgba(239,83,80,0.5)';ctx.fillRect(x-w/2,Math.min(y,mid),w,Math.abs(y-mid));});
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,212,255,0.8)';ctx.lineWidth=1;
    mV.forEach((v,i)=>{const x=xB(i);i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,yV(v)):ctx.lineTo(x,yV(v));});ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,107,43,0.8)';ctx.lineWidth=1;
    sV.forEach((v,i)=>{const x=xB(i);i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,yV(v)):ctx.lineTo(x,yV(v));});ctx.stroke();
    if(lbl)lbl.textContent='MACD(12,26,9)';
  } else if(ST.sub==='stoch'){
    const st=CH_stoch(all).slice(ST.startIdx,ST.startIdx+bars.length);
    [[20,'rgba(239,83,80,0.15)'],[80,'rgba(239,83,80,0.15)']].forEach(([lv,c])=>{
      const y=H*(1-lv/100);ctx.strokeStyle=c;ctx.lineWidth=0.8;ctx.setLineDash([3,4]);
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(cW,y);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(80,120,150,0.6)';ctx.font='8px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.fillText(lv,cW+3,y+3);
    });
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(139,92,246,0.85)';ctx.lineWidth=1.2;
    st.forEach((v,i)=>{if(v===null)return;const x=xB(i),y=H*(1-v/100);i===0||st[i-1]===null?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);});ctx.stroke();
    const lastS=st.filter(v=>v!==null).pop()||50;
    if(lbl)lbl.textContent=`Stoch(14): ${lastS.toFixed(1)}`;
  }
}

// ── DRAWINGS ──────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_renderDrawings(ctx,cW,dp){
  ST.drawings.forEach(d=>{
    ctx.strokeStyle=d.color||'rgba(255,200,0,0.8)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.setLineDash([]);
    if(d.type==='hline'){
      const y=pToY(d.price);
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(cW,y);ctx.stroke();
      ctx.fillStyle=d.color||'rgba(255,200,0,0.8)';ctx.font='9px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='right';
      ctx.fillText(d.price.toFixed(dp),cW-3,y-3);
    } else if(d.type==='trend'||d.type==='rect'){
      const x1=xOfBar(d.b1-ST.startIdx),y1=pToY(d.p1);
      const x2=xOfBar(d.b2-ST.startIdx),y2=pToY(d.p2);
      ctx.beginPath();
      if(d.type==='trend'){ctx.moveTo(x1,y1);ctx.lineTo(x2,y2);}
      else{ctx.rect(Math.min(x1,x2),Math.min(y1,y2),Math.abs(x2-x1),Math.abs(y2-y1));ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,200,0,0.04)';ctx.fill();}
      ctx.stroke();
    } else if(d.type==='fib'){
      const x1=xOfBar(d.b1-ST.startIdx),x2=xOfBar(d.b2-ST.startIdx);
      const pR=d.p1-d.p2;
      [0,0.236,0.382,0.5,0.618,0.786,1].forEach((lv,fi)=>{
        const cols=['#ef5350','#ff9800','#f5c518','#26a69a','#2196f3','#9c27b0','#ef5350'];
        const fp=d.p2+pR*(1-lv),fy=pToY(fp);
        ctx.strokeStyle=cols[fi];ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.setLineDash([4,4]);
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(Math.min(x1,x2),fy);ctx.lineTo(Math.max(x1,x2),fy);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle=cols[fi];ctx.font='8px JetBrains Mono';ctx.textAlign='right';
        ctx.fillText(`${(lv*100).toFixed(1)}% ${fp.toFixed(dp)}`,Math.max(x1,x2)-2,fy-2);
      });
    }
  });
}

// ── RENDER LOOP ───────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_frame(){
  if(CH_dirty){
    CH_resize();
    CH_layout();
    CH_drawSub();
    CH_drawMain();
    CH_dirty=false;
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(CH_frame);
}

// ── LIVE TICK ─────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_liveTick(){
  if(!ST.candles.length)return;
  const cp=S.prices[S.pair];if(!cp)return;
  const dp=cp.d||5,last=ST.candles[ST.candles.length-1];
  last.c=+(Math.max(0.001,last.c+(Math.random()-0.49)*last.c*0.0004)).toFixed(dp);
  last.h=Math.max(last.h,last.c);last.l=Math.min(last.l,last.c);
  if(Math.random()<0.06){
    const o=last.c,c=+(o+(Math.random()-0.49)*o*0.0005).toFixed(dp);
    ST.candles.push({o,h:Math.max(o,c)+Math.random()*Math.abs(c-o)*0.3,l:Math.min(o,c)-Math.random()*Math.abs(c-o)*0.3,c,v:Math.floor(50+Math.random()*500),t:Date.now()});
    if(ST.candles.length>500)ST.candles.shift();
    CH_buildHA();
  }
  CH_dirty=true;
}

// ── EVENTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_bindEvents(){
  const area=document.getElementById('mainChartArea');if(!area)return;
  area.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
    const r=area.getBoundingClientRect();ST.mx=e.clientX-r.left;ST.my=e.clientY-r.top;
    if(ST.drag){const dx=e.clientX-ST.dragX0;const delta=Math.round(dx/(ST.barSpacing||8));const maxOff=ST.candles.length-5;ST.rightOffset=Math.max(0,Math.min(maxOff,ST.dragOff0-delta));}
    CH_dirty=true;
  });
  area.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{ST.mx=-1;ST.my=-1;CH_dirty=true;});
  area.addEventListener('mousedown',e=>{
    if(ST.tool==='cursor'){ST.drag=true;ST.dragX0=e.clientX;ST.dragOff0=ST.rightOffset;area.style.cursor='grabbing';}
    else{
      const r=area.getBoundingClientRect();const mx=e.clientX-r.left,my=e.clientY-r.top;
      const bi=ST.startIdx+Math.max(0,Math.min(ST.barsData.length-1,barAtX(mx)));
      const p=ST.pMax-(ST.pMax-ST.pMin)*((my-CFG.SUB)/ST.mH);
      if(ST.tool==='hline'){ST.drawings.push({type:'hline',price:p,color:'rgba(255,200,0,0.85)'});CH_dirty=true;}
      else{ST.drawStart={b:bi,p};}
    }
  });
  area.addEventListener('mouseup',e=>{
    if(ST.drag){ST.drag=false;area.style.cursor='default';}
    else if(ST.drawStart){
      const r=area.getBoundingClientRect();const mx=e.clientX-r.left,my=e.clientY-r.top;
      const bi=ST.startIdx+Math.max(0,Math.min(ST.barsData.length-1,barAtX(mx)));
      const p=ST.pMax-(ST.pMax-ST.pMin)*((my-CFG.SUB)/ST.mH);
      const cols={trend:'rgba(255,200,0,0.85)',rect:'rgba(0,200,255,0.7)',fib:'multi'};
      ST.drawings.push({type:ST.tool,b1:ST.drawStart.b,p1:ST.drawStart.p,b2:bi,p2:p,color:cols[ST.tool]||'rgba(255,200,0,0.85)'});
      ST.drawStart=null;CH_dirty=true;
    }
  });
  area.addEventListener('wheel',e=>{e.preventDefault();ST.barsVis=Math.max(5,Math.min(300,Math.round(ST.barsVis*(e.deltaY<0?0.82:1.22))));CH_dirty=true;},{passive:false});
  area.addEventListener('dblclick',()=>{ST.barsVis=80;ST.rightOffset=0;CH_dirty=true;});
  // close indicator panel on outside click
  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const btn=document.getElementById('indBtn'),panel=document.getElementById('indPanel');
    if(panel&&btn&&!btn.contains(e.target)&&!panel.contains(e.target))panel.classList.remove('open');
  });
}

// ── PUBLIC API ────────────────────────────────────────────
function CH_setType(t,el){
  ST.type=t;if(t==='heikin')CH_buildHA();
  document.querySelectorAll('.ct-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');CH_dirty=true;
}
function CH_setTF(m,el){
  ST.tf=m;CH_gen(S.pair);
  document.querySelectorAll('.tf-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');
}
function CH_setSub(type,el){
  ST.sub=type;
  document.querySelectorAll('#subRSI,#subMACD,#subSTOCH').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');CH_dirty=true;

function tickPrices(){
  Object.keys(S.prices).forEach(pair=>{
    const info=S.prices[pair];
    const vol=pair.includes('BTC')||pair.includes('ETH')||pair.includes('SPX')||pair.includes('NAS')||pair.includes('GER')?30:pair.includes('XAU')||pair.includes('XAG')?0.3:pair.includes('JPY')?0.015:0.0004;
    info.p+=((Math.random()-.49)*vol);
    info.p=Math.max(0.001,info.p);
  });
  // Update watchlist
  const pws=['EUR/USD','GBP/USD','USD/JPY','USD/CHF','AUD/USD','USD/CAD','NZD/USD','EUR/GBP','XAU/USD','XAG/USD','XPT/USD','BTC/USD','ETH/USD','SOL/USD','XRP/USD','SPX500','NAS100','GER40'];
  pws.forEach((pair,i)=>{
    const el=document.getElementById('pw'+i);
    if(!el) return;
    const info=S.prices[pair];
    el.textContent=info.p>=1000?Math.round(info.p).toLocaleString():info.p.toFixed(info.d);
  });
  // Topbar
  document.getElementById('tb0').textContent=S.prices['EUR/USD'].p.toFixed(5);
  document.getElementById('tb1').textContent=S.prices['GBP/USD'].p.toFixed(5);
  document.getElementById('tb2').textContent=S.prices['XAU/USD'].p.toFixed(2);

function calcRisk(){
  const vol=parseFloat(document.getElementById('fVol').value)||0.1;
  const risk=(vol*10000*0.008).toFixed(2);
  const reward=(risk*1.5).toFixed(2);
  document.getElementById('rbRisk').textContent='-$'+risk;
  document.getElementById('rbReward').textContent='+$'+reward;
  document.getElementById('rbRR').textContent='1:'+(reward/risk).toFixed(1);
  document.getElementById('rbMargin').textContent='$'+(vol*S.prices[S.pair]?.p*1000/100).toFixed(2);
}

  const pair=S.pair,mode=S.mode,price=S.prices[S.pair]?.p.toFixed(5),vol=document.getElementById('fVol').value;
  showToast(`✅ ${LANG==='ar'?(mode==='buy'?'شراء':'بيع'):(mode==='buy'?'BUY':'SELL')} ${pair} @ ${price} — ${vol} Lot`,mode==='buy'?'t-buy':'t-sell');

let tradeHistory = [];
function buildTradeHistory(){
  tradeHistory = Array.from({length:20},(_,i)=>{
    const pairs=['EUR/USD','GBP/USD','XAU/USD','BTC/USD','USD/JPY','AUD/USD'];
    const pair=pairs[i%pairs.length];
    const dir=Math.random()>.5?'buy':'sell';
    const dp=S.prices[pair]?.d||5;
    const base=S.prices[pair]?.p||1.08;
    const entry=+(base*(0.994+Math.random()*.012)).toFixed(dp);
    const pnl=+((Math.random()-.32)*220).toFixed(2);
    const exit=+(entry+(pnl>0?0.001:-0.001)).toFixed(dp);
    const hr=Math.floor(Math.random()*23), mn=Math.floor(Math.random()*59);
    return {id:200-i, pair, dir, vol:(+(0.05+Math.random()*0.45)).toFixed(2), entry, exit, pnl, time:`${String(hr).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(mn).padStart(2,'0')}`, status:'CLOSED'};
  });
}

function calcLot(){
  const balance=28470.55;
  const riskPct=parseFloat(document.getElementById('lcRisk')?.value)||2;
  const slPips=parseFloat(document.getElementById('lcSL')?.value)||20;
  const info=S.prices[S.pair]||{p:1.0843,d:5};
  const isJPY=S.pair.includes('JPY'), isXAU=S.pair.includes('XAU'), isBTC=S.pair.includes('BTC');
  const pipVal=isJPY?0.01:isXAU?0.1:isBTC?1:0.0001;
  const lotVal=isJPY?1000:isXAU?100:isBTC?1:10; // $ per pip per lot
  const riskDollars=balance*(riskPct/100);
  const slDollars=slPips*pipVal*lotVal;
  const suggestedLot=slDollars>0?Math.max(0.01,+(riskDollars/slDollars).toFixed(2)):0.01;
  const el1=document.getElementById('lcResult'), el2=document.getElementById('lcRiskDollar');
  if(el1) el1.textContent=suggestedLot.toFixed(2);
  if(el2) el2.textContent='$'+riskDollars.toFixed(0);
  // Auto-fill the volume input
  const fVol=document.getElementById('fVol');
  if(fVol) fVol.value=suggestedLot.toFixed(2);
  calcRisk();
}

  const toast=document.getElementById('alertToast')?.checked;
  const typeLabels={price_above:`${pair} > ${price}`,price_below:`${pair} < ${price}`,
    rsi_ob:`RSI تشبع شراء على ${pair}`,rsi_os:`RSI تشبع بيع على ${pair}`,
    macd_cross_up:`MACD تقاطع صاعد على ${pair}`,macd_cross_dn:`MACD تقاطع هابط على ${pair}`};
  activeAlertsList.push({id:alertIdCounter++,pair,type,price,sound,toast,label:typeLabels[type],active:true,created:new Date().toLocaleTimeString()});
  renderAlertsList();
  showToast(`🔔 تنبيه مُضاف: ${typeLabels[type]}`);
}
function removeAlert(id){
  const idx=activeAlertsList.findIndex(a=>a.id===id);
  if(idx>-1){activeAlertsList.splice(idx,1);renderAlertsList();}
}
function renderAlertsList(){
  const el=document.getElementById('alertsList'); if(!el) return;
  const countEl=document.getElementById('alertCount');
  if(countEl) countEl.textContent=activeAlertsList.length;
  if(!activeAlertsList.length){
    el.innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--text4);font-size:11px;text-align:center;padding:20px">لا توجد تنبيهات نشطة</div>';
    return;
  }
  const impC={price_above:'var(--cyan)',price_below:'var(--red)',rsi_ob:'var(--red)',rsi_os:'var(--green)',macd_cross_up:'var(--green)',macd_cross_dn:'var(--red)'};
  el.innerHTML=activeAlertsList.map(a=>`
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
      <span style="width:8px;height:8px;background:${impC[a.type]||'var(--cyan)'};border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;animation:pulse 2s infinite"></span>
      <div style="flex:1">
        <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)">${a.label}</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text4)">أُضيف: ${a.created} ${a.sound?'🔊':''} ${a.toast?'💬':''}</div>
      </div>
      <button onclick="removeAlert(${a.id})" style="background:rgba(255,51,102,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,51,102,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 7px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer">×</button>
    </div>`).join('');
}
function addAlertHistory(msg,color='var(--cyan)'){
  const el=document.getElementById('alertHistory'); if(!el) return;
  const now=new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
  const existing=el.innerHTML.includes('لا يوجد')?'':'';
  el.innerHTML=`<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px">
    <span style="color:${color};flex-shrink:0">🔔</span>
    <div><div style="color:var(--text)">${msg}</div><div style="color:var(--text4);font-size:9px">${now}</div></div>
  </div>`+(el.innerHTML.includes('لا يوجد')?'':el.innerHTML);
}
function toggleQuickAlert(type,el){
  // Update activeAlerts object used by checkAlerts
  if(typeof activeAlerts!=='undefined') activeAlerts[type.replace('-','')]=el.checked;
}
function testAlertSound(){
  try{
    const ctx=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
    [880,1100,880].forEach((freq,i)=>{
      const osc=ctx.createOscillator(),gain=ctx.createGain();
      osc.connect(gain);gain.connect(ctx.destination);
      osc.frequency.value=freq;gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.3,ctx.currentTime+i*0.15);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ctx.currentTime+i*0.15+0.12);
      osc.start(ctx.currentTime+i*0.15);osc.stop(ctx.currentTime+i*0.15+0.12);
    });
  }catch(e){}
  showToast('🔔 اختبار صوت التنبيه!');
}

// ===== LAB — Backtesting + Bot integration =====
let labChartInstance=null;
function runBacktest(){
  const btn=document.getElementById('backtestBtn');
  const resultsEl=document.getElementById('labResults');
  btn.textContent='⏳ جارٍ الاختبار...'; btn.disabled=true;

  setTimeout(()=>{
    // Simulate backtest using actual candle data + selected indicators
    const candles=ST.candles.length>50?ST.candles:Array.from({length:200},(_,i)=>{
      const p=1.08+(Math.random()-0.5)*0.05; return {o:p,h:p+0.001,l:p-0.001,c:p+(Math.random()-0.5)*0.0008,v:500};
    });
    const closes=candles.map(c=>c.c);
    const rsiVals=CH_rsi(closes,14);
    const macdRes=CH_macd(closes);
    const ema20=CH_ema(closes,20);
    const ema50=CH_ema(closes,50);
    const riskPct=parseFloat(document.getElementById('labRisk')?.value)||2;
    const rrTarget=parseFloat(document.getElementById('labRR')?.value)||2;
    const useRSI=document.getElementById('lab-rsi')?.checked;
    const useMACD=document.getElementById('lab-macd')?.checked;
    const useEMA=document.getElementById('lab-ema')?.checked;

    let equity=10000, wins=0, losses=0, totalTrades=0;
    const equityCurve=[equity];
    const trades=[];

    for(let i=52;i<candles.length-1;i++){
      const rsi=rsiVals[i-1]||50;
      const macdH=macdRes.h[i]||0, macdHP=macdRes.h[i-1]||0;
      const e20=ema20[i],e50=ema50[i],price=closes[i];
      let buyScore=0;
      if(useRSI&&rsi<38) buyScore+=2;
      if(useRSI&&rsi>62) buyScore-=2;
      if(useMACD&&macdH>0&&macdHP<0) buyScore+=2;
      if(useMACD&&macdH<0&&macdHP>0) buyScore-=2;
      if(useEMA&&price>e20&&e20>e50) buyScore+=1;
      if(useEMA&&price<e20&&e20<e50) buyScore-=1;

      if(Math.abs(buyScore)>=3){
        const dir=buyScore>0?'buy':'sell';
        const sl=dir==='buy'?price*0.997:price*1.003;
        const tp=dir==='buy'?price*(1+0.003*rrTarget):price*(1-0.003*rrTarget);
        const risk=equity*(riskPct/100);
        const exitPrice=candles[i+1]?.c||price;
        const win=(dir==='buy'&&exitPrice>price)||(dir==='sell'&&exitPrice<price);
        const pnl=win?risk*rrTarget:-risk;
        equity+=pnl; totalTrades++;
        if(win) wins++; else losses++;
        equityCurve.push(equity);
        trades.push({dir,entry:price.toFixed(5),pnl:pnl.toFixed(2),win});
      }
    }

    const winRate=totalTrades>0?(wins/totalTrades*100).toFixed(1):0;
    const netPnl=(equity-10000).toFixed(0);
    const maxDD=(Math.min(...equityCurve)-10000).toFixed(0);
    const profitFactor=losses>0?((wins*rrTarget)/losses).toFixed(2):'∞';

    resultsEl.innerHTML=`
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px">
        <div class="stat-card sc-green"><div class="stat-label">NET P&L</div><div class="stat-val ${netPnl>=0?'up':'dn'}">${netPnl>=0?'+':''}$${netPnl}</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card sc-gold"><div class="stat-label">WIN RATE</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--gold)">${winRate}%</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card sc-cyan"><div class="stat-label">TRADES</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--cyan)">${totalTrades}</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card sc-red"><div class="stat-label">MAX DD</div><div class="stat-val dn">$${maxDD}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px">
        <div style="background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud)">PROFIT FACTOR</div>
          <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--purple)">${profitFactor}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud)">WINS / LOSSES</div>
          <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700"><span style="color:var(--green)">${wins}</span><span style="color:var(--text4)"> / </span><span style="color:var(--red)">${losses}</span></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-hud)">FINAL EQUITY</div>
          <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan)">$${equity.toFixed(0)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>`;

    // Draw equity curve
    if(labChartInstance){labChartInstance.destroy();}
    const ctx=document.getElementById('labChart')?.getContext('2d');
    if(ctx&&equityCurve.length>1){
      labChartInstance=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:equityCurve.map((_,i)=>i),datasets:[{data:equityCurve,borderColor:equity>10000?'rgba(0,255,136,.8)':'rgba(255,51,102,.8)',borderWidth:1.5,fill:true,backgroundColor:equity>10000?'rgba(0,255,136,.07)':'rgba(255,51,102,.07)',pointRadius:0,tension:.3}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{display:false},y:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,212,255,.05)'},ticks:{color:'#5a8299',font:{size:9},callback:v=>'$'+v.toFixed(0)}}}}});
    }
    // Store last strategy for bot
    window._lastLabStrategy={useRSI,useMACD,useEMA,riskPct,rrTarget,winRate,netPnl};
    btn.textContent='▶ تشغيل الاختبار'; btn.disabled=false;
    showToast(`✅ الاختبار اكتمل — ${totalTrades} صفقة | ${winRate}% فوز`,'t-buy');
  },600);
}
function applyStratToBot(){
  if(!window._lastLabStrategy){showToast('⚠️ شغّل الاختبار أولاً!');return;}
  const s=window._lastLabStrategy;
  showToast(`🤖 تم تطبيق الاستراتيجية على البوت | Win Rate: ${s.winRate}%`,'t-buy');
  addBotLog(`Strategy applied from Lab: RSI=${s.useRSI?'✓':'✗'} MACD=${s.useMACD?'✓':'✗'} EMA=${s.useEMA?'✓':'✗'} | R:R=${s.rrTarget}`,'info');
}

// ===== SMART ALERTS CHECK =====
const activeAlerts={rsi:true,ma:true,loss:true,margin:true,'rsi-ob':true,'rsi-os':true,macd:true};
let lastAlertTime=0;
function checkAlerts(pair){
  const now=Date.now(); if(now-lastAlertTime<10000) return;
  if(!ST.candles||ST.candles.length<15) return;
  const closes=ST.candles.map(c=>c.c);
  const rsiArr=CH_rsi(closes,14);
  const rsi=rsiArr.filter(v=>v!==null).pop()||50;
  if(activeAlerts['rsi-ob']&&rsi>75){
    lastAlertTime=now;
    const msg=`⚠️ ${pair} — RSI=${rsi.toFixed(1)} تشبع شراء!`;
    showToast(msg,'t-sell'); addAlertHistory(msg,'var(--red)');
    playAlertSound(880);
  } else if(activeAlerts['rsi-os']&&rsi<25){
    lastAlertTime=now;
    const msg=`⚠️ ${pair} — RSI=${rsi.toFixed(1)} تشبع بيع!`;
    showToast(msg,'t-buy'); addAlertHistory(msg,'var(--green)');
    playAlertSound(440);
  }
}
function playAlertSound(freq=880){
  try{
    const ctx=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const osc=ctx.createOscillator(),gain=ctx.createGain();
    osc.connect(gain);gain.connect(ctx.destination);
    osc.frequency.value=freq;gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.25,ctx.currentTime);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ctx.currentTime+0.4);
    osc.start();osc.stop(ctx.currentTime+0.4);
  }catch(e){}
}

// ===== SETTINGS =====
function switchSettings(tab,el){
  S.settingsTab=tab;
  document.querySelectorAll('.sn-item').forEach(i=>i.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active'); renderSettings(tab);
}
function renderSettings(tab){
  const c=document.getElementById('settingsContent'); if(!c) return;
  if(tab==='api'){
    c.innerHTML=`<div class="s-section-title">API CONNECTIONS</div>
      ${[['🟡','Binance','binance','Disconnected'],['🔵','MetaTrader 5','mt5','Disconnected'],['🟠','Bybit','bybit','Disconnected'],['⚪','Interactive Brokers','ib','Disconnected'],['🟢','OANDA','oanda','Connected']].map(([icon,name,id,status])=>`
      <div class="api-key-row"><span class="api-exchange-icon">${icon}</span>
        <div style="flex:1"><div class="api-exchange-name">${name}</div><div class="api-exchange-status ${status==='Connected'?'api-connected':'api-disconnected'}">● ${status}</div></div>
        <input class="api-inp" placeholder="API Key" style="max-width:140px">
        <input class="api-inp" placeholder="Secret" type="password" style="max-width:120px">
        <button class="api-connect-btn" onclick="connectAPI('${name}',this)">${LANG==='ar'?'ربط':'Connect'}</button>
      </div>`).join('')}`;
  } else if(tab==='customize'){
    c.innerHTML=`<div class="s-section-title">THEMES</div>
      <div class="theme-grid">
        <div class="theme-swatch selected" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#020408,#0c1520)" onclick="selectTheme(this)"><span style="color:var(--cyan)">Cyber</span></div>
        <div class="theme-swatch" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#080400,#201000)" onclick="selectTheme(this)"><span style="color:#f5c518">Gold</span></div>
        <div class="theme-swatch" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#000808,#001a10)" onclick="selectTheme(this)"><span style="color:#00ff88">Matrix</span></div>
        <div class="theme-swatch" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a0010,#1a0030)" onclick="selectTheme(this)"><span style="color:#8b5cf6">Purple</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="s-section-title">LAYOUT</div>
      ${[['show-volume','Show Volume','Display volume bars on chart'],['show-indicators','Show Indicators','MA/RSI on chart'],['dark-candles','Dark Candles','Use dark candle body colors']].map(([id,l,s])=>`
      <div class="s-toggle-row"><div><div class="s-toggle-label">${l}</div><div class="s-toggle-sub">${s}</div></div><label class="toggle-sw"><input type="checkbox" ${id==='show-volume'||id==='show-indicators'?'checked':''}><div class="toggle-sl"></div></label></div>`).join('')}`;
  } else if(tab==='notif'){
    c.innerHTML=`<div class="s-section-title">NOTIFICATIONS</div>
      ${[['Price Alerts','Get notified when price hits target','checked'],['AI Signals','New AI trading signals','checked'],['Bot Trades','Bot execution notifications','checked'],['News Alerts','High-impact news events',''],['Risk Warnings','Margin & risk alerts','checked']].map(([l,s,ch])=>`
      <div class="s-toggle-row"><div><div class="s-toggle-label">${l}</div><div class="s-toggle-sub">${s}</div></div><label class="toggle-sw"><input type="checkbox" ${ch}><div class="toggle-sl"></div></label></div>`).join('')}`;
  } else if(tab==='security'){
    c.innerHTML=`<div class="s-section-title">SECURITY</div>
      <div class="f-grp" style="margin-bottom:14px"><div class="f-lbl">CURRENT PASSWORD</div><input class="f-inp" type="password" placeholder="••••••••"></div>
      <div class="f-grp" style="margin-bottom:14px"><div class="f-lbl">NEW PASSWORD</div><input class="f-inp" type="password" placeholder="••••••••"></div>
      <button onclick="showToast('✅ Password updated!')" style="padding:9px 18px;background:var(--cyan3);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--cyan);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700">Update Password</button>
      <div class="s-divider"></div>
      <div class="s-section-title">2FA AUTHENTICATION</div>
      <div class="s-toggle-row"><div><div class="s-toggle-label">Two-Factor Auth</div><div class="s-toggle-sub">Secure your account</div></div><label class="toggle-sw"><input type="checkbox"><div class="toggle-sl"></div></label></div>`;
  } else if(tab==='general'){
    c.innerHTML=`<div class="s-section-title">GENERAL SETTINGS</div>
      <div class="f-grp" style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="f-lbl">DEFAULT CURRENCY</div><select class="f-inp"><option>USD</option><option>EUR</option><option>GBP</option></select></div>
      <div class="f-grp" style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="f-lbl">TIMEZONE</div><select class="f-inp"><option>UTC+3 (Riyadh)</option><option>UTC+4 (Dubai)</option><option>UTC+0 (London)</option><option>UTC-5 (New York)</option></select></div>
      <div class="f-grp" style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="f-lbl">DATE FORMAT</div><select class="f-inp"><option>DD/MM/YYYY</option><option>MM/DD/YYYY</option></select></div>
      ${[['Sound Alerts','Play sound on trade execution','checked'],['Auto-Refresh','Auto refresh market data','checked'],['Confirm Trades','Show confirm dialog','checked']].map(([l,s,ch])=>`
      <div class="s-toggle-row"><div><div class="s-toggle-label">${l}</div><div class="s-toggle-sub">${s}</div></div><label class="toggle-sw"><input type="checkbox" ${ch}><div class="toggle-sl"></div></label></div>`).join('')}`;
  }
}
function connectAPI(name,btn){
  btn.textContent='جارٍ...';
  setTimeout(()=>{btn.textContent='✓ متصل';btn.style.color='var(--green)';btn.style.borderColor='rgba(0,255,136,.3)';showToast(`✅ Connected to ${name}`);},1800);
}
function selectTheme(el){document.querySelectorAll('.theme-swatch').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('selected'));el.classList.add('selected');showToast('تم تطبيق الثيم');}

// ===== TOAST =====
function showToast(msg,cls=''){
  const t=document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent=msg; t.className='toast show '+(cls||'');
  setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),3000);
}

// ===== BOT — upgraded with strategy integration =====
function addBotLog(msg,type='info'){
  const now=new Date();
  S.botLogs.unshift({time:now.toLocaleTimeString(),msg,type});
  if(S.botLogs.length>50) S.botLogs.pop();
  const el=document.getElementById('bot-log');
  if(el&&el.style.display!=='none') renderBotLog();
}

// ===== SWITCHPAGE — include new pages =====
function switchPage(id,el){
  document.querySelectorAll('.full-page').forEach(p=>{p.classList.remove('active');p.style.display='none';});
  document.getElementById('page-dashboard').style.display='none';
  if(id==='dashboard'){
    document.getElementById('page-dashboard').style.display='flex';
    setTimeout(()=>{CH_dirty=true;},50);
  } else {
    const pg=document.getElementById('page-'+id);
    if(pg){pg.style.display='flex';pg.classList.add('active');}
    if(id==='portfolio') setTimeout(initPortCharts,80);
    if(id==='performance') setTimeout(()=>{initPerfCharts();renderTradeHistory('all');},80);
    if(id==='risk') {setTimeout(initRiskCharts,80);renderRiskContent();}
    if(id==='settings') renderSettings(S.settingsTab||'api');
    if(id==='news') renderNews();
    if(id==='calendar') renderCalendar();
    if(id==='alerts') renderAlertsList();
    if(id==='lab'){}
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  if(el) el.classList.add('active');
  else document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(t=>{if(t.onclick&&t.onclick.toString().includes("'"+id+"'"))t.classList.add('active');});
}

// ===== INIT =====
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
  CH_gen('EUR/USD');
  setTimeout(()=>{ CH_bindEvents(); CH_initIndPanel(); requestAnimationFrame(CH_frame); },80);

  setInterval(CH_liveTick, 1500);
  setInterval(()=>{ tickPrices(); renderOPP(); }, 2000);
  setInterval(()=>checkAlerts(S.pair), 12000);
  setInterval(renderSignals, 30000);

  renderOPP();
  renderSignals();
  buildTradeHistory();
  calcRisk();
  calcLot();
  renderSettings('api');
  startClock();

  const cp=S.prices['EUR/USD'];
  const slEl=document.getElementById('fSL'), tpEl=document.getElementById('fTP');
  if(slEl) slEl.value=(cp.p-0.005).toFixed(5);
  if(tpEl) tpEl.value=(cp.p+0.0075).toFixed(5);
  calcRisk();

  setInterval(()=>{
    const b=28470+((Math.random()-.4)*50);
    const el=document.getElementById('pmBalance');
    if(el) el.textContent='$'+b.toFixed(2);
  },5000);

  window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{ CH_dirty=true; });
  const af=document.getElementById('arr-forex');
  if(af) af.classList.add('open');

  // Close indicator panel on outside click
  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const btn=document.getElementById('indBtn'),panel=document.getElementById('indPanel');
    if(panel&&btn&&!btn.contains(e.target)&&!panel.contains(e.target)) panel.classList.remove('open');
  });
});
</script>


</body></html>
